claims.evidence_text: Among cereal crops, wheat exhibits a moderate level of salt tolerance, being less tolerant than barley ( Hordeum vulgare ) but more tolerant than rice
claims.claim_summary: Wheat has moderate salt tolerance among cereals: less tolerant than barley, more tolerant than rice.

claims.evidence_text: for every unit increase in salinity, seeds, spike, 1000-grain weight and economic yield are significantly reduced in both salt-sensitive and salt-tolerant wheat varieties
claims.claim_summary: Each unit increase in salinity significantly reduces wheat seed set, spike number, 1000-grain weight and economic yield.
